name: Rice Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a heavy skillet.
2. Mix together all dry ingredients in a bowl.
3. Blend in the eggs, rice, and vanilla until well combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
5. Optionally, dust the fritters with powdered sugar before serving.
6. Serve to kids or enjoy as desired.
